intent_precise:
Compound Plating: Using None (plate, slot 8), None (tuberack, slot 9). (1) Transfer from source to destination. (2) Pause: 



Replace 96-well plates and tip racks. Insert two new tip racks in positions 10 and 11, remove all 96-well plates from positions 1-7, and insert five new 96-well plates in positions 1-5.
intent: For the compound plating protocol, you'll need to transfer compounds from the source plate in slot 8 to the destination using the tube rack in slot 9. After completing the initial transfer, pause the run so we can refresh our consumables - go ahead and replace all the 96-well plates by removing them from positions 1-7 and placing five fresh plates in positions 1-5, then swap out the tip racks by inserting two new ones in positions 10 and 11. Once everything is swapped out, you can resume the protocol to complete the compound plating.

commands.message: Replace 96-well plates and tip racks. Insert two new tip racks in positions 10 and 11, remove all 96-well plates from positions 1-7, and insert five new 96-well plates in positions 1-5.
